---
title: Inclusive Monte Carlo samples
---

## Reconstructed $J/\psi$ samples

The latest $J/\psi$ samples are located here according to the [production page](https://docbes3.ihep.ac.cn/~offlinesoftware/index.php/Production) (requires login):

:::{.column-page-inset-right}

<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->
| Year | Round | Inclusive **MC** | Sub-folder |
|:----:|:-----:|----------:|:------------------------------------|
| 2009 | `round02` |   $224 \times 10^6$ | `/bes3fs/offline/data/708-1/jpsi/round02/mc/dst` |
| 2012 | `round05` | $1.087 \times 10^9$ | `/bes3fs/offline/data/708-1/jpsi/round05/mc/dst` |
| 2018 | `round11` |   $4.6 \times 10^9$ | `/bes3fs/offline/data/708-1/jpsi/round11/mc/dst` |
| 2019 | `round12` |   $4.1 \times 10^9$ | `/bes3fs/offline/data/708-1/jpsi/round12/mc/dst` |
<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->

:::

See [this page](../getting-started/server.qmd#data-paths) for the latest data file locations.

:::{.callout-tip}
See an indication of the number of $J/\psi$ events in [this presentation](https://indico.ihep.ac.cn/event/8795/session/3/contribution/9/material/slides/0.pdf) (requires login).
:::
